summary: Iter21 tests PASSED: P0b DB state clean (only admin + 3 core services), P1 upload-receipt endpoint works both with and without payment_id in body, P0a CSS visual fixes verified on login + homepage + admin dashboard.

issues: Overview stat card shows 'Users: 0' although admin exists in DB — likely admin filtered out of count. Not a CSS/contrast bug, just noting.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~2469 lines — should be split into routers/modules (auth, payments, admin, subscriptions) for maintainability.
Admin overview 'Users' count shows 0 even though 1 admin exists — likely intentional (filtering role=admin) but confirm expected behavior.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test user + a couple of subscriptions/groups during upload-receipt tests. All cleaned up at end. Final DB state: users=1, services=3, all others=0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DB is minimal (admin + 3 services). Register endpoint lowercases email. Payment lookup in DB uses _id ObjectId, not id field. Subscription creation endpoint is POST /api/me/subscriptions/join (not /api/me/subscriptions). Tests in test_iter21.py handle all this.
rca of the issue: P0a root cause confirmed: .brutal/.pd-tag CSS was OUTSIDE @layer components; wrapping in @layer components restored Tailwind utility precedence. Visual verification on live URL shows MASUK=black-on-yellow, HEMAT=black-on-yellow, 100% LEGAL=white-on-blue — all readable.
